title: The 0x Pack
description: Low res is all the rage, so I made all block textures 0x0 in size.
body:
**I heard low resolution resourcepacks are all the rage, so I decided to one up everyone with a 0x0 resolution pack. What could go wrong?**

If 1x1 resourcepacks can increase your fps by a hundred, I wonder what this can do...


<details>
<summary></summary>

Yes, this is very much a joke. But, I think seeing how Minecraft breaks when given 0x0 sized textures is fun.

For extra fun, shuffle around the textures by pressing F3+T!

</details>
